source: TRAI Annual Report 2023-24: Jio ARPU ₹182, Airtel ARPU ₹209, Vodafone Idea ₹146. Airtel targets ₹300 ARPU by FY27. Industry median ~₹170-180.
Airtel FY25 EBITDA margin: ~50%, Jio FY25: ~48%. Vodafone Idea FY25: ~26% (stressed). Indus Towers: ~44% EBITDA. GSMA India 2024.
Jio FY25: ~35%, Airtel FY25: ~38%. TRAI: network O&M 35-45% of telecom revenue. Best-in-class: cloud-native network with active sharing.
Jio FY25: ~5%, Airtel FY25: 6.9%, Indus Towers: 3.6%. TRAI: 5-8% of revenue.
DoT/TRAI: Licence fee 8% of AGR + Spectrum Usage Charge 3-5% of AGR = 11-13% of AGR. Airtel FY25: licence fees 13.8% of revenue.
TRAI Annual Report 2023-24: India average data usage 19.5 GB/user/month. Jio: ~27 GB/user. Industry median: ~18-22 GB. GSMA Mobile Economy India 2024.
